text_block_list.name: Chrono Genesis
text_block_list.text: Ah… looks like that space over there is being renovated.
choice_data_list: <size=39>I wonder what kind of shop will move in next?</size>

text_block_list.name: Chrono Genesis
text_block_list.text: Yeah… Personally, I'd love it if it were a racing café. Watching live races on a big screen, hearing other customers' predictions and all…

text_block_list.name: Chrono Genesis
text_block_list.text: Oh… an outdoor shop would be nice too. They'd have binoculars, winter gear, and all kinds of things useful for spectating…

On my day off. I ran into Chrono Genesis while she was shopping,
so I decided to tag along.
Her intense passion for racing history. Every time I get a glimpse of it, I am struck by the same thought.
choice_data_list: <size=40>(I want to catch up to that passion too…!)</size>
<size=40>(I want to catch up to that passion too…!)</size>

text_block_list.name: Chrono Genesis
text_block_list.text: 15 frames per second in burst mode, and 30 with an electronic shutter… Hmm… it's really nice… but yeah, the price…
choice_data_list: A new camera for shooting races?

text_block_list.name: Chrono Genesis
text_block_list.text: Ah, yes… I've been feeling like my current camera is a bit lacking. Though with my allowance, there's only so much I can afford…

text_block_list.name: Camera Shop Clerk
text_block_list.text: Are you looking for something? If you'd like, I can recommend something close to what you're after within your budget.

text_block_list.name: Chrono Genesis
text_block_list.text:
R-Really? Thank you so much!
In that case—…

text_block_list.name: Camera Shop Clerk
text_block_list.text: With your current equipment, adding a lens should do the trick. This one has a focal length of 70 to 300mm, and excellent subject tracking.

text_block_list.name: Chrono Genesis
text_block_list.text: Waah…! There are plenty of racecourses where 300mm is enough. Tokyo Racecourse is pretty big, but with the right skill and positioning, it should work well…
choice_data_list: (I-I see…?)

text_block_list.name: Chrono Genesis
text_block_list.text: It has a unique stabilization system, and it corrects chromatic aberration really well… And if I get it used, I might be able to afford it if I save up my allowance…!

text_block_list.name: Chrono Genesis
text_block_list.text:
………Ah. I-I'm sorry…!
I got a little carried away……
choice_data_list: Don't worry about it

text_block_list.name: Chrono Genesis
text_block_list.text:
"Game Theory of Wind and Horseshoes" … "Winning Strategies Through Historical Data" …
…Yeah. Looks like all the books I want are in stock.

text_block_list.name: Chrono Genesis
text_block_list.text: Though… it might take a while to get them. This store is pretty big……and the genres are all over the place…
choice_data_list: Then let's split up and grab them!

text_block_list.name: Chrono Genesis
text_block_list.text: Oh… thank you. In that case, could I ask you to get the science books? I'll look for the history ones……
After finding the books, I headed to the meeting spot. But Chrono Genesis was taking a while to show up.
choice_data_list: (Did something happen…?)

text_block_list.name: Chrono Genesis
text_block_list.text:
Records from discontinued racecourses…!?
Some of these go back over a hundred years…!

text_block_list.name: Chrono Genesis
text_block_list.text: Amazing… what a find…! To understand the development of modern racing, information from that time is essential—but materials like these are incredibly rare…!
choice_data_list: Chrooono～?

text_block_list.name: Chrono Genesis
text_block_list.text:
Huh…?
…Ah, Trainer…!!

text_block_list.name: Chrono Genesis
text_block_list.text:
I'm so, so sorry…!!
I found something really valuable and just…
choice_data_list: Really, I don't mind

text_block_list.name: Chrono Genesis
text_block_list.text: B-But…

Chrono Genesis looked completely apologetic.
Trying to cheer her up, I looked around for something—
choice_data_list: Hey, why don't we go over there?
Hey, why don't we go over there?

text_block_list.name: Chrono Genesis
text_block_list.text:
A race café…
I didn't know there was one here…
choice_data_list: We can enjoy the races together here!
We can enjoy the races together here!

text_block_list.name: Chrono Genesis
text_block_list.text: Ah… yes, thank you very much…

text_block_list.name: Chrono Genesis
text_block_list.text: (…I really am making them go out of their way for me, aren't I… And not just today…)

text_block_list.name: Chrono Genesis
text_block_list.text:
(Trainer is a kind person…
Even when I get completely absorbed in racing, they just smile and accept it…)

text_block_list.name: Chrono Genesis
text_block_list.text:
(But… if I keep causing trouble like this,
even my Trainer might eventually…)

text_block_list.name: Man with a Pen
text_block_list.text: Hey there, you two! Got a minute?

We turned toward the voice and saw a man and a woman
holding a racing newspaper, waving with smiles.
choice_data_list: Yes, what is it?

text_block_list.name: Horseshoe-Pattern Woman
text_block_list.text:
We were just talking about the last race.
See, this one marked in red here…

text_block_list.name: Chrono Genesis
text_block_list.text:
Let's see… turf 1800… a front-runner-favored course…
Ah, this race…!

text_block_list.name: Man with a Pen
text_block_list.text:
Oh! You saw it too, miss? Man, she had a great run!
That #4 horsegirl!

text_block_list.name: Horseshoe-Pattern Woman
text_block_list.text:
Look at you now. Who was it that said
she'd probably struggle this time?

text_block_list.name: Man with a Pen
text_block_list.text:
Hey, she'd been out for a long time, right?
Even after coming back, she wasn't doing great, so I figured it'd be tough.

text_block_list.name: Chrono Genesis
text_block_list.text:
Y-Yes…!
I think her strategy really paid off…!

text_block_list.name: Horseshoe-Pattern Woman
text_block_list.text: Strategy?

text_block_list.name: Chrono Genesis
text_block_list.text: Ah… yes. The #4 runner… it's true she hasn't had strong results since returning, but her graded race two starts ago wasn't that bad…

text_block_list.name: Chrono Genesis
text_block_list.text: Considering her record before her long break, those two races were likely meant to help her regain condition—more like rehabilitation.

text_block_list.name: Chrono Genesis
text_block_list.text:
So she came into this race very well prepared…!
Even from a historical perspective, there have been similar strategies—

text_block_list.name: Man with a Pen
text_block_list.text:
Well… as expected of a horsegirl, I guess…
You really know more than we do…

text_block_list.name: Chrono Genesis
text_block_list.text:
――……!
I-I'm sorry, I said too much…!
choice_data_list: <size=33>Exactly! She's passionate—and really knows her stuff!</size>

text_block_list.name: Chrono Genesis
text_block_list.text: Eh…?

text_block_list.name: Horseshoe-Pattern Woman
text_block_list.text:
Seriously. Just now, the look in her eyes completely changed!
It's like she's completely devoted to racing—
choice_data_list: Yeah. I'm always blown away by it
Yeah. I'm always blown away by it

text_block_list.name: Man with a Pen
text_block_list.text: Haha! Sounds like you've got your hands full, young man!
choice_data_list: But that's exactly why it's so much fun!

text_block_list.name: Man with a Pen
text_block_list.text: Haha! Sounds like you've got your hands full, young lady!
choice_data_list: But that's exactly why it's so much fun!

text_block_list.name: Chrono Genesis
choice_data_list: It makes me want to catch up to her!
It makes me want to catch up to her!

text_block_list.name: Chrono Genesis
text_block_list.text:
……Thank you very much for today.
For spending so much time with me…

text_block_list.name: Chrono Genesis
text_block_list.text:
U-Um… I had fun…
…A lot…
choice_data_list: <size=33>It was a day where I really felt your passion, too!</size>
<size=33>It was a day where I really felt your passion, too!</size>

text_block_list.name: Chrono Genesis
text_block_list.text: My… passion…
choice_data_list: I hope we get to do this again sometime

text_block_list.name: Chrono Genesis
text_block_list.text:
Ah… um… yes!
I-If you really don't mind… then again, sometime…

text_block_list.name: Chrono Genesis
text_block_list.text: (Again… they said. Trainer, do you really mean it…?)
『But that's exactly why it's so much fun!』
『It makes me want to catch up to her!』
『It makes me want to catch up to her!』

text_block_list.name: Chrono Genesis
text_block_list.text: (…I hope it's true… There's something I want you to see, too…)

text_block_list.name: Chrono Genesis
text_block_list.text: (Me… and the things I love…)
